title: The Reason for the Rebellion of the Baghdad Group and the Consequence of Their Action and That of Ahmad b. Nair
description: and the Consequence of Their Action and That of Alimad b. Nasr The reason for this was that Ahmad b. Nair b. Malik b. al-Haytham al-Khuza'i89... Malik b. al-Haytham was one of the naqibs of the 'Abbasids, and his son was occasionally visited by Hadith scholars, such as Yahya b. Ma'in,90 Ibn al-Dawragi,91 and Abu Khaythamah.92 Ahmad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
